chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C.P N0.D-133 0f 2024 ٥3،٤ Oroer with signature T For orUers on offfice objections For hearing of main case 01.02.2024 Mr Mushtaque Ahmed Lund Advocate for the Petitioner Mr, Zeeshan Haider Advocate for ECP Mr Dareshani Ali Haider ' Ada 0AG Mr Ali Raza Balouch, AAG along with Agha Sher Zaman, DC Ghotki/ DRO HHhnnnnr ٣n ٣ ٣ ٧ ٣ ٦ ٣ 4 With consent this petition is disposed of in the terms whereby apart from polling station Government Primary School Kauro Samejo polling station Government Primary School Mehrab Samejo would established accommodate an٥ provide convenience the petitioner an٥ other voters living the surrounding areas »٧٥g٤
